message:
test: pin fcntl record-locks conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_fcntl_record_locks.rs covering fcntl():
- F_SETLK + F_WRLCK / F_RDLCK / F_UNLCK: write/read lock round-trip
  on a 64-byte tempfile
- F_GETLK on unlocked region: returns F_UNLCK in l_type
- F_SETLK with NULL flock pointer: fails on both impls

Complements bd-flk1 (flock+lockf) with byte-range record locks.

5 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-frlk1
